title: medicago sativa var. pauciflora
intro: Medicago sativa var. pauciflora, also known as the few-flowered lucerne or few-flowered alfalfa, is a variety of the medicago sativa plant, belonging to the Fabaceae family and native to Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic and expectorant effects, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Medicago sativa var. pauciflora include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from respiratory issues to digestive problems.
